title: Simulation Theory
description: Simulation Theory is a Brighton-born improvised comedy group performing fast, funny and completely unpredictable shows to sell-out audiences across the city. Fresh from packed-out nights in Westdene and featured in The Argus and Sussex Express, they return for a Brighton Fringe special. Every scene is made up on the spot and inspired by your suggestions - from ridiculous characters to unexpected storylines, anything can happen. No two shows are ever the same. Expect a relaxed, friendly, laid-back atmosphere and big laughs, created by performers trained with the world-renowned AndAlso Improv company. Grab your friends, BYOB and head down to The Barn for a superb night of Brighton-born comedy. “Hilarious, friendly, laid back and local” “Sharp-witted... great laughs all evening” “So many great characters and plot twists — laughed a lot”
